title: mangifera pseudoindica
intro: Mangifera pseudoindica, also known as the Pseudoundi mango, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mangifera pseudoindica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications like creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
